title: FhirHubAuditEvent
description: Append-only audit record for every PHI-bearing read, write, or replay. Written to S3 with Object Lock (Compliance) in AWS and to an append-only JSONL file in local dev. MUST NOT contain PHI, source-message values, or stack traces.

auditId.description: Globally unique identifier for this audit record.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Bump for incompatible changes; an ADR is required.

timestampUtc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the audited operation.

identity.description: Stable identifier. For the demo, 'demo-operator' for operator actions and 'system:ingestion' / 'system:transformation' / 'system:read' for system actions.

correlationId.description: End-to-end correlation ID for this operation (SC-009).

id.description: Hub-assigned identifier of the resource. NOT a FHIR business identifier (which could be PHI).

operation.description: What was done. 'delete' is not currently used but is reserved.

failureReason.description: Present only when outcome is 'failure'. Constrained to summary-safe fields.

summary.description: Summary-safe text. MUST NOT contain source-message values.

sourceIp.description: Caller IP for HTTP-triggered operations. Null for purely internal triggers.

userAgent.description: Caller User-Agent header for HTTP-triggered operations.
